Marcus Holloway

Of Counsel

Chicago

Houston

Overview

Marcus Holloway focuses his practice on energy regulatory matters and infrastructure project finance. He has advised utilities, pipeline operators, and independent power producers on permitting and compliance.

Practices

  • Energy Regulation
  • Project Finance
  • Infrastructure
  • Regulatory Compliance

Sectors

  • Energy
  • Utilities
  • Infrastructure

Group

Energy & Infrastructure

Locations

Education

  • B.S. in Economics, Northwestern University, 2006
